title: nymphaea stellata var. parviflora
intro: Nymphaea stellata var. parviflora, also known as the small-flowered star water lily or fragrant water lily, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the Nymphaea genus. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Nymphaea stellata var. parviflora include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various skin conditions due to its antibacterial and antifungal properties. In herbal preparations, the plant's flowers and leaves are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to treat various health issues.
